titleStmt.title: SII 31.192: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 192. (A.R. No. B 207 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the northern wall of the kitchen in the Agastyēśvara svāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1464, Subhakṛit, Kārttīka śu. 11, corresponding to October 22, Tuesday, 1482 A.D.

Registers the gift of 50 māḍas for maintaining the tiruvaḷike to the god Agastīśvara for the merit of Aṅkaya by his brother Pōlireḍḍi and Basvireḍḍi, the sons of Tallapareḍi Chinnapareḍi of Kaṁnāṭi. The gift is entrusted to the sthānikas of the temple with the stipulation to maintain both morning tiruvaḷike and evening tirukāpulu by purchasing the land from income derived from the source.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrī Agastēśvarāyanamaḥ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣa
ṁbulu 1464 Agunēṁṭi śubhakṛtu saṁvatsara kā¨rttīka su 11 lu śrīAgastīśvaruni divyaśrīpāda
padmaṁbulku kaṁnāṭi tallapareḍḍi cinnapareḍi komāḷlu pōlireḍḍi basvireḍiṁgāru ja 2 nnu tama taṁmu
ṁḍu Aṁkayaku puṇyaṁgānu Anaṁttamulaina daṁḍamulu sama¨rppiṁci Iccina tha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ
mī saṁnidhini tiruvāḷake vuṁḍē Aṁdku kaṭṭaḍaku ga 50 Akṣarālānu yābhaimāḍalu yī māḍa
stānikulu nalumaḍi jayyalu vīrajiyyalu AIṁgāri jiyyalu muṁmmaḍi jiyyalu caṁṭa jiyyalu
da jiyyalu modalayina sdhānaṁvāri vaśāna tathātithi puṇyaka(kā)lamaṁdu yistimi . stānaṁvāru yīmāḍala
modalu ceḍakuṁḍānu sēsi cēnu maḍibhōgyaṁ daḍḍikāni krayaṁkoni tamatamavaṁtulu rūpu sēsi svā
mi saṁnithini tiravaḷiki pagalu nālgu jāmulunu rātri tirukāpulu mūsinadanukānu svāmi saṁnithini
biḍḍabiḍḍa manvaṁtramunnu vuttarōttara kālaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkastāIgānu peṭṭaṁgalavāru yavuriva
rusalōnalyē(lē)kuṁḍānu Āvarusavāru tamavaṁtu māḍalu yīśāsanaṁ vrāsina Ārabhyaṁgānu
vaḍḍi tōnu māḍalu marṇabeṭṭuvāru . Iṭani ja 2 ramunnu trivācakaṁgānu trikaruṇasuthigānu
tathātidhi puṇyakālamaṁdu vrāI ṁcina tharmaśāsanaṁ The letter i is engraved below the line.
Digital edition of SII 31.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
